manifest.name: Image Tab Zoom

name: Image Tab Zoom

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Image Zoom 1.0.0 — initial release**

Pinch-zoom and modifier-scroll zoom for image files opened in their own tab.

### Highlights
- Trackpad pinch-to-zoom on macOS, centered on the pinch midpoint.
- Two-finger pinch-to-zoom on iPad/iPhone, with two-finger pan during the pinch.
- Modifier + scroll wheel zoom with a configurable modifier (Cmd, Ctrl, either, or none — "none" lets plain scroll zoom).
- Cursor-anchored zoom — the image coordinate under your cursor or pinch midpoint stays put while scaling.
- Drag to pan when zoomed in, clamped smoothly to the image's own edges so it cannot be dragged off-screen.
- Double-click (desktop) or double-tap (touch) resets zoom to 1x; togglable in settings.
- Per-tab state — each open image tab has its own zoom, and navigating to a different image in the same tab starts fresh at 1x.
- Settings: modifier key, zoom sensitivity, maximum zoom, reset-on-double-click toggle. Changes take effect immediately without a reload.

### Install
- **Manual:** download `manifest.json` and `main.js` from this release and copy them into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/image-zoom/`, then enable under `Settings → Community plugins`.
- **Community plugins browser:** pending approval in the Obsidian community directory.

### Scope
Only image **files** opened directly in Obsidian (`.png`, `.jpg`, `.webp`, etc. in their own tab) are affected. Images embedded inside markdown notes are not touched.

### Compatibility
Requires Obsidian 1.5.0 or later. Works on desktop (macOS trackpad pinch, Cmd/Ctrl + scroll) and mobile (iOS pinch).
